abilities.name: Camouflaged
abilities.text: While this model is within 1" of blocking terrain, it has cover.

abilities.name: Rewarding Kill
abilities.text: After an ally in LoS kills an enemy model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to have that ally heal 3.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Hunter's Bow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this attack is declared, choose if it has a range of (melee)1" or (gun)12".
actions.effects: If this attack receives at least one raise, the target gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

actions.name: Herd Prey
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Distracted token from the target.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3". If a Distracted token was removed, move the target up to an additional 4", ignoring vertical distance and terrain.

triggers.name: Slither Closer
triggers.text: Choose a piece of terrain in base contact with the target. An ally within 1" of chosen terrain may place in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Hunting Call
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Distracted token.
